name: PAWN SHOP - Watches Etc
description_short: knabazar is an eBay reseller store operating as a general merchandise marketplace, not a pawn shop. They sell collectibles, jewelry, electronics, and watches through eBay's platform.
description_long:
knabazar operates as an eBay Store, not a traditional pawn shop or financial services provider. The business functions as a high-volume reseller and marketplace merchant on eBay's platform, with 99.4% positive feedback and over 25,000 items sold. Despite the CreditDoc categorization as "PAWN SHOP - Watches Etc," the website reveals knabazar is exclusively an eBay-based retail operation with no pawn lending, collateral loans, or financial services offerings. The store was initially miscategorized, as the only financial connection is that eBay's payment processing and seller tools may facilitate transactions.

knabazar offers a broad inventory across multiple product categories including jewelry, gemstones, watches, coins and banknotes, vintage items, consumer electronics, collectibles, musical instruments, eyewear, fragrances, and home improvement products. Their merchandise ranges from brand-new items to used and vintage goods. The store explicitly states "We open all Items (Including Brand New) for Inspection before Shipping," indicating quality control procedures for physical merchandise inspection prior to fulfillment.

The primary distinction of knabazar is their high seller rating (99.4% positive feedback) and substantial sales volume (25,000+ items sold), suggesting reliable eBay marketplace performance and customer satisfaction. They maintain a diverse inventory strategy across 30+ product categories rather than specializing in watches or pawn services. The store operates transparently on eBay's established buyer-protection platform with seller accountability and rating systems.

Honestly assessed, knabazar is fundamentally misclassified in the "pawn-shops" category. This is an eBay merchandise reseller, not a financial services company, pawn lender, or collateral-based lending operation. They neither issue loans, accept pledges of personal property, nor provide any credit or financial products. Consumers seeking actual pawn shop services for loans against collateral should not contact this merchant. The "Watches Etc" designation appears to reference their watch inventory category rather than their business model.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 99.4% positive feedback rating indicating strong seller reliability and customer satisfaction
Extensive inventory of 25,000+ items across 30+ product categories for diverse shopping options
Pre-shipment inspection policy for all items including brand new merchandise
Established eBay Store with 783 followers and transparent seller ratings and reviews
International shipping availability for global customers
Competitive pricing visible on listed items with real-time availability
Access to eBay's buyer protection policies and dispute resolution mechanisms
cons: Completely miscategorized as a pawn shop when they are purely an eBay reseller with no lending or collateral services
Website is in Portuguese language interface, creating accessibility barriers for English-speaking consumers
No direct business website—operates exclusively through eBay platform without independent online presence
Generic eBay store with minimal business branding or differentiation beyond product selection
Cannot provide actual pawn shop services, loans, or collateral-based lending despite category placement
best_for: eBay marketplace shoppers seeking collectibles, vintage items, and jewelry with verified seller ratings
International buyers looking for watches, electronics, and vintage merchandise with global shipping
Consumers comfortable with eBay's transaction and buyer-protection framework
diagnosis: knabazar is an eBay reseller store, not a pawn shop or financial services company. This profile has been severely miscategorized—consumers seeking pawn loans, collateral-based lending, or watch appraisals with loan advances should not contact this merchant, as they offer only merchandise resale through eBay's platform. The categorization error should be corrected to reflect their actual business model as an online reseller.
services: eBay resale and marketplace sales of jewelry and gemstones
Watch and timepiece sales and inventory
eBay Store management and seller services
Buyer communication and customer service through eBay platform
